original_image_tags: A thick red horizontal redaction bar is positioned at the top center of the page.
A thick red horizontal redaction bar is positioned at the bottom center of the page.

elements.description: Page containing typed text, form fields, and classification markings. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts are visible. Two horizontal red redaction bars are present: one near the top right and one at the bottom center. A classification stamp is in the top right corner reading 'Declassified by MG Richard A. Harrison USCENTCOM Chief of Staff Declassified on: 22 January 2026'. The bottom of the page includes the text 'USCENTCOM MDR 26-0019', a redaction bar with text '3.5c, (b)(6)', 'Approved for Release to AARO', and '01/26/26 003'.

judge.reason: Description A claims there are two redaction bars (top center, bottom center) while Description B describes the top bar as 'near the top right' and the bottom bar as 'at the bottom center', indicating a positional contradiction, and Description B additionally includes specific quoted text from a classification stamp and page footer that Description A does not mention.
